interaction-transition-control: background-color var(--interaction-motion-medium) var(--interaction-ease-standard), border-color var(--interaction-motion-medium) var(--interaction-ease-standard), color var(--interaction-motion-medium) var(--interaction-ease-standard), opacity var(--interaction-motion-medium) var(--interaction-ease-standard), transform var(--interaction-motion-medium) var(--interaction-ease-standard)
glass-overlay-backdrop-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface-color) 10%, transparent) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface-color) 8%, transparent) 100%)
control-border-color: var(--control-border, var(--border-color, color-mix(in srgb, var(--text-color, #ffffff) 12%, transparent)))

nav-menu-mobile-columns-padding: calc(84px * var(--accessibility-density-scale)) calc(18px * var(--accessibility-density-scale)) calc(28px * var(--accessibility-density-scale))
